# MuleSoft Azure Data Lake Storage Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.0) of Azure Data Lake Storage Connector documentation.
> See [Azure Data Lake Storage Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-data-lake-storage-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Azure Data Lake Storage Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Azure Data Lake Storage Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-data-lake-storage-connector/latest/azure-data-lake-connector-examples.md)
- [Azure Data Lake Storage Connector Module Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-data-lake-storage-connector/latest/azure-data-lake-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Azure Data Lake Storage Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-data-lake-storage-connector/latest/azure-data-lake-connector-studio.md)
- [Azure Data Lake Storage - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-data-lake-storage-connector/latest/azure-data-lake-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Azure Data Lake Storage Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/azure-data-lake-storage-connector/latest/index.md)
